title: OncoMap: a curated, literature-grounded catalog of oncology spatial-omics datasets
description: OncoMap is a curated metadata catalog of publicly available oncology spatial-omics datasets - spatial transcriptomics and spatial proteomics - with the tumour microenvironment as its focus. Each record is a dataset, paper, method, or group node validated against JSON Schema and a three-tier curation trust gate (machine_draft to human_reviewed to verified); a verified record requires a live-resolving accession, a last_verified date, and a linked source publication. Cancer types are coded in OncoTree (with NCI Thesaurus cross-maps) and tissues in UBERON, from frozen, membership-enforced vocabulary snapshots. The v0.1 snapshot contains 247 datasets across 42 cancer types: 175 spatial-transcriptomics (Visium, Visium HD, Xenium, CosMx, MERFISH, Slide-seq, Stereo-seq, ST arrays) and 72 spatial-proteomics (CODEX, CyCIF, MxIF, mIHC, MIBI, IMC, Orion, GeoMx), harvested from GEO, ArrayExpress, CZ CELLxGENE, Zenodo, HTAN, and the EBI BioImage Archive. Data records are released under CC-BY-4.0; the build tooling is MIT-licensed.
